meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Folio AI
products.tagline: Claude for PowerPoint, on steroids
products.summaryZh: Claude for PowerPoint 增强版
products.descriptionZh: Folio AI 是首款实时AI幻灯片协作工具，可直接在PowerPoint或Google Slides中使用。其运行速度比同类产品快至少6倍，同时性能表现更优。
products.description: Folio AI is the first real-time AI copilot for slides. It works directly in PowerPoint or Google Slides. And it's at least 6x faster than the competition, while being more performant.

products.name: QApilot's CoWork
products.tagline: 3x Mobile Automation. Same QE Team.
products.summaryZh: 3倍移动自动化。同一质量工程团队。
products.descriptionZh: CoWork 将现有测试用例转化为可执行的移动自动化，通过 AI 规划、人工确认的重新规划，以及在 iOS、Android 和 Flutter 上的真实设备执行来实现。
products.description: CoWork turns existing test cases into executable mobile automation with AI planning, human-approved replanning, and real-device execution on iOS, Android, and Flutter.

products.name: RetroMac
products.tagline: Turn your Mac into a time machine.
products.summaryZh: 将你的Mac变成时光机。
products.descriptionZh: RetroMac 将日常使用的 macOS 包裹在经典电脑的外观与体验中：全屏呈现真实的 CRT 着色器、主题化的程序坞与桌面（Mac OS 9、Windows XP/98、BeOS、Amiga 等）、复古小工具与游戏，以及一个能将 CRT 视觉效果传输至 Zoom、Meet 或 Teams 的虚拟摄像头。开源免费使用，可选一次性升级以获取额外预设与摄像头支持。
products.description: RetroMac wraps your everyday macOS in the look and feel of classic computers: authentic CRT shaders over your whole screen, themed docks and desktops (Mac OS 9, Windows XP/98, BeOS, Amiga…), retro widgets and games, and a virtual webcam that pipes the CRT look into Zoom, Meet or Teams. Open source, free to use with an optional one-time upgrade for extra presets and webcam support.

products.name: Cloud World Model
products.tagline: Simulate AWS, GCP & DigitalOcean without paying the bill
products.summaryZh: 模拟AWS、GCP和DigitalOcean，无需付费
products.descriptionZh: 模拟AWS、GCP、Azure、OCI和DigitalOcean架构，无需配置真实资源或支付云账单，即可预测成本、性能和弹性。专为练习云技能的学习者以及训练云优化能力的AI代理而构建。
products.description: Simulate AWS, GCP, Azure, OCI & DigitalOcean architectures to predict cost, performance, and resilience without provisioning real resources or paying a cloud bill. Built for learners practicing cloud skills and AI agents training on cloud optimization.

products.name: Supra Player
products.tagline: Compare & Sync Videos Fast
products.summaryZh: 快速比较与同步视频
products.descriptionZh: Supra Player 是一款轻量级 macOS 应用，专为视频审阅、对比和同步而设计。支持最多 12 个视频并排对比，具备帧级精确播放、自动音频同步、共享缩放和平移、可自定义布局、标注功能以及即时切换——无需完整视频编辑器的复杂性。
products.description: Supra Player is a lightweight macOS app built for reviewing, comparing, and syncing video. Compare up to 12 videos side by side with frame-accurate playback, automatic audio sync, shared zoom and pan, customizable layouts, annotations, and instant switching—without the complexity of a full video editor.

products.name: OpenBot
products.tagline: Tag specialized agents like friends or employees
products.summaryZh: 将专业智能体标记为朋友或员工
products.descriptionZh: OpenBot 是一个开源、本地优先的运行环境，允许你将多种智能体放入单一工作空间，并通过简洁的标签与频道系统进行编排。只需为智能体的能力打上标签，OpenBot 即可动态分配任务、同步协作流程，并在本地文件系统中管理持久化线程。完全模块化、完全自包含，专为希望对其智能体集群拥有绝对结构控制权的开发者与创客打造。
products.description: OpenBot is an open-source, local-first runtime that lets you drop diverse agents into a single workspace and orchestrate them using a clean tag-and-channel system. Just tag their capabilities and let OpenBot dynamically route tasks, sync collaborative workflows, and manage persistent threads right in your local file system. Fully modular, completely self-contained, and built for developers and makers who want absolute structural control over their agent fleets.

products.name: Velocity 2.0 Prompt Co-Pilot
products.tagline: One click prompt enhancement for any AI tool, with context!
products.summaryZh: 一键提示增强，适用于任何AI工具，并支持上下文！
products.descriptionZh: Velocity 是提示词领域的 Grammarly。只需一键，即可将任何文本转化为上下文感知的提示词。该 Chrome 扩展兼容 ChatGPT、Claude、Lovable 和 Runway 等 40 多种工具，在提升输出质量的同时节省时间和 Token。无论你是在进行氛围编程、写作，还是创作图像或视频，都能适用。通过网页应用创建和管理提示词，或浏览精选提示词库。AI 的表现取决于你给出的提示词。使用 Velocity，无需专业知识也能像专家一样编写提示词。
products.description: Velocity is Grammarly for prompting. It turns any text into context-aware prompts, in one-click. The Chrome Extension works across 40+ tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Lovable and Runway Save time and tokens while improving output quality instantly. Whether you're vibe coding, writing, creating images or videos. Create, manage prompts with the web app, or explore the curated prompt library AI is only as good as the prompts you give it. Use Velocity to Prompt like an expert, without any expertise!

products.name: A.S.S.H.O.L.E.™
products.tagline: Brutally honest. Surprisingly helpful.
products.summaryZh: 坦诚到不留情面，却意外地有用。
products.descriptionZh: A.S.S.H.O.L.E.™（人类操作、逻辑与效率的坚定系统助手）是您的AI驱动第二大脑。它能记住重要事项，主动提醒您遗忘的内容，连接工作与生活中的信息，并敢于质疑欠妥的决策。它不像聊天机器人，更像那位直言不讳的朋友，帮您保持条理、专注，始终领先一步。您的记忆，全面升级。
products.description: A.S.S.H.O.L.E.™ (Assertive Systems Sidekick for Human Operations, Logic & Efficiency) is your AI-powered second brain. It remembers what matters, proactively reminds you of what you've forgotten, connects information across your work and life, and isn't afraid to challenge questionable decisions. Less like a chatbot, more like the brutally honest friend who keeps you organized, focused, and one step ahead. Your memory, upgraded.

products.name: VibeRaven
products.tagline: Open-source mission control for AI-built apps
products.summaryZh: AI构建应用的开源任务控制
products.descriptionZh: 扫描AI构建的仓库，检查认证、计费、数据库、部署、监控和测试方面的发布缺口，然后为你的编码助手获取一个聚焦的提示。
products.description: Scan AI-built repos for launch gaps across auth, billing, database, deploy, monitoring, and tests, then get one focused prompt for your coding agent.

products.name: MeetingMemo
products.tagline: Finally, a fully private meeting & call recorder for Mac
products.summaryZh: 终于，一款完全私密的Mac会议与通话录音工具来了。
products.descriptionZh: MeetingMemo 在 Mac 上全程记录、转录并总结会议与通话——音频数据绝不离开设备。Granola、Otter 和 Fathom 会将所有内容上传至云端，而 MeetingMemo 不会。内置免费本地 AI（无需 API 密钥），开箱即可生成私密摘要与待办事项。
products.description: MeetingMemo records, transcribes, and summarizes your meetings and calls entirely on your Mac — your audio never leaves the device. Granola, Otter, and Fathom upload everything to their cloud; MeetingMemo doesn't. Free on-device AI is built in (no API key), so private summaries and action items work out of the box.

products.name: Letter Maps
products.tagline: A free teleprompter that follows your voice
products.summaryZh: 免费提词器，随声而动
products.descriptionZh: Letter maps 是一款免费的浏览器端提词器，可跟随语音滚动：暂停时等待，加速时同步。无需登录，无需安装。脚本保留在浏览器中，语音识别可完全在设备端离线运行。
products.description: Letter maps is a free, browser-based teleprompter that scrolls to follow your voice, pause and it waits, speed up and it keeps pace. No sign-in, no install. Your script stays in your browser, and recognition can run fully on-device and offline.

products.name: HabitHook Pro
products.tagline: Deep analytics & social leagues for serious habit builders.
products.summaryZh: 深度分析与社交排行榜，专为认真培养习惯的用户设计。
products.descriptionZh: 多数习惯类应用只展示你做了什么。HabitHook Pro 则揭示它为何有效——或为何无效。🕘 深度分析——一致性评分、最佳表现时间、最强日表现及逐项习惯分解。真实模式，而非虚荣数据。🏆 我的联赛——与真正认识的人竞争。在个人圈内比较连续天数、评分与完成率。5000+用户。4.9星。零付费广告。单人创始人。运营两年。提供免费方案。Pro版每月249卢比。支持安卓与iOS。🔥
products.description: Most habit apps show you what you did. HabitHook Pro shows you why it's working — or why it's not. 🕘 Deep Analysis — Consistency Score, peak performance time, strongest day & habit-by-habit breakdown. Real patterns, not vanity stats. 🏆 My League — Compete with people you actually know. Compare streaks, scores & completion rates inside your personal Circle. 5,000+ users. 4.9★. Zero paid ads. Solo founder. 2 years in. Free plan available. Pro at ₹249/month. Android & iOS. 🔥

products.name: Yoga Unlock
products.tagline: Unlock Apps with Yoga
products.summaryZh: 用瑜伽解锁应用
products.descriptionZh: 用瑜伽解锁将屏幕时间转化为运动。在打开令人分心的应用前，先完成一段简短的瑜伽练习。与其无意识地滑动屏幕，不如在解锁应用前花点时间拉伸、活动、调整状态。无论你是想减少社交媒体使用、保持高效，还是培养更健康的习惯，瑜伽解锁都能帮你在每次使用手机时暂停、活动，并做出更有意识的选择。
products.description: Turn screen time into movement with Yoga Unlock. Complete a short yoga session before opening distracting apps. Instead of mindless scrolling, take a moment to stretch, move, and reset before unlocking your apps. Whether you're cutting down on social media, staying productive, or building healthier habits, Yoga Unlock helps you pause, move, and make more intentional choices every time you use your phone.

products.name: QuietHaven
products.tagline: Helping students find places to study.
products.summaryZh: 帮助学生找到学习场所。
products.descriptionZh: 登录您的Expo账户。
products.description: Log in to your Expo account.

products.name: OCR.chat
products.tagline: OCR that reads your documents — then lets you chat with them
products.summaryZh: 识别文档的OCR——然后让你与文档对话
products.descriptionZh: 免费在线OCR。将图片和PDF转换为可编辑文本、表格和LaTeX，支持100多种语言——随后可与文档对话，获取引用自具体页面的答案。无需注册即可试用。
products.description: Free online OCR. Convert images and PDFs to editable text, tables and LaTeX in 100+ languages — then chat with your document and get answers cited to the page. No signup to try.

products.name: Copilot Buddy
products.tagline: A tiny Bluetooth desk pet for your GitHub Copilot CLI
products.summaryZh: 一个为你的GitHub Copilot CLI设计的迷你蓝牙桌面宠物
products.descriptionZh: 认识 Copilot Buddy——一款小巧的桌面伙伴，为你的 AI 编程助手赋予身体与心跳。它会在你工作时活起来：为你加油打气，需要你时亮起灯光，平静时则小憩片刻。最棒的是，你始终掌握主动权——只需轻轻一按，即可当场批准或停止你的助手，无需紧盯屏幕。它会升级进化，为你的成就撒花庆祝，并全天候陪伴你。既是忠诚的搭档，也是你会真心喜爱的桌面宠物。
products.description: Meet Copilot Buddy — a tiny desk companion that gives your AI coding assistant a body and a heartbeat. It comes alive as you work: cheering you on, lighting up when it needs you, and napping when things are calm. Best of all, you stay in charge — a single press lets you approve or stop your assistant on the spot, no eyes glued to the screen. It levels up, throws confetti for your wins, and keeps you company all day. Part loyal sidekick, part desk pet you'll actually love.

products.name: Nada
products.tagline: Compose music with just your voice
products.summaryZh: 仅用声音即可创作音乐
products.descriptionZh: Nada 是将你的声音转化为音乐的最简单方式。哼唱、演唱或吹口哨表达一个灵感，即可立即将其转换为 MIDI。在手机上编排你的旋律，从多种乐器中选择，随时随地构建歌曲。不涉及 AI 生成，纯粹是你的创意，以更快的速度被捕捉。
products.description: Nada is the easiest way to turn your voice into music. Hum, sing, or whistle an idea, and instantly convert it into MIDI. Arrange your melodies on mobile, choose from a variety of instruments, and build songs wherever inspiration strikes. No AI generation involved, just your own creativity, captured faster.

products.name: Epilogue. Write novels, scripts & poetry
products.tagline: The professional book writing app built for serious authors
products.summaryZh: 专为严肃作者打造的专业书籍写作应用
products.descriptionZh: Epilogue 是为认真对待写作的创作者打造的环境。无论你是在起草首部小说、构建剧本结构、汇编诗集，还是与庞大的试读群体分享完稿，Epilogue 都能让你保持流畅状态。无干扰、无服务器延迟、无绑定限制。
products.description: Epilogue is the writing environment built for writers who take their craft seriously. Whether you're drafting your first novel, structuring a script, compiling a collection of poems, or sharing a finished book with a large alpha reader group, Epilogue keeps you in flow. No distractions, no server lag, no lock-in.

products.name: Wysera
products.tagline: One AI agent. Every department. Content, CRM & ops.
products.summaryZh: 一个AI代理。覆盖所有部门。内容、客户关系管理与运营。
products.descriptionZh: Wysera 打造 PostWyse（AI 内容与 SEO）和 OpsWyse（AI 优先的 CRM）。两款产品，同一套 AI。真正推动业务增长的工作。
products.description: Wysera builds PostWyse (AI content & SEO) and OpsWyse (AI-first CRM). Two products. One AI. The work that actually moves the needle.

products.name: Themefy
products.tagline: Transform your browser tabs with stunning & interactive art
products.summaryZh: 用惊艳的交互式艺术改造你的浏览器标签页
products.descriptionZh: 用 Themefy 将浏览器变成互动杰作！告别单调的新标签页，探索不断扩充的沉浸式 3D/2D 动画和精选壁纸库。通过高级搜索栏和常用网站快捷入口，一键直达心仪的搜索引擎。每周新增主题，让浏览体验持续焕新。个性化你的工作流，保持灵感在线，用精美动态视觉为浏览器注入生命力！
products.description: Transform your browser into an interactive masterpiece with Themefy! Say goodbye to boring new tabs and explore a growing library of immersive 3D/2D animations and premium wallpapers. Access your favorite search engine instantly with an advanced search bar and quick access to your Top Sites. With fresh themes added weekly, your browsing experience is always evolving. Personalize your workflow, stay inspired, and bring your browser to life with beautiful, dynamic visuals!
